detail.description:
Welcome to Hay Day, the fun farm simulator game! Build a farm, go fishing, raise animals, and explore the Valley. Farm with friends and decorate your own slice of country paradise.

Farming has never been easier! Grow crops like wheat and corn in this farm simulator, and even though it never rains, they never die. Harvest and replant seeds to multiply crops, then make goods to sell. Befriend animals like chickens, pigs, and cows as you expand and grow! Feed your animals to produce eggs, bacon, d
detail.recentChanges:
- Spring is blooming on the farm with smoother progress and new ways to earn rewards.
- Some players may discover extra rewards from Boat and Truck Orders.
- Starting your farming journey is now smoother, with better early rewards and an easier path to Sanctuary animals.
- Crops, axes, and saws can now be purchased with coins.
- Improvements to Derby, Town, Events, Tutorials, UI, rewards, and Golden Key Chests.
